mapper.insert: insert into recommendation_log (user_id, flight_id, recommended_dishes, algorithm_type, user_feedback, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{flightId}, #{recommendedDishes}, #{algorithmType}, #{userFeedback}, now())
mapper.select: select rl.id, rl.user_id, rl.flight_id, rl.recommended_dishes, rl.algorithm_type, rl.user_rating, rl.user_feedback, rl.create_time, fi.flight_number, fi.departure, fi.destination, fi.departure_time, fi.arrival_time from recommendation_log rl left join flight_info fi on fi.id = rl.flight_id where rl.user_id = #{userId} order by rl.create_time desc limit 20

select fr.id as ratingTaskId, fr.source_log_id as logId, fr.flight_id as flightId, fr.rating_status as ratingStatus, fr.defer_count as deferCount, fr.next_remind_at as nextRemindAt, fr.expire_at as expireAt, rl.recommended_dishes as recommendedDishes, fi.flight_number as flightNumber, fi.departure, fi.destination, fi.departure_time as departureTime, fi.arrival_time as arrivalTime from flight_service_rating fr left join recommendation_log rl on rl.id = fr.source_log_id inner join flight_info fi on fi.id = fr.flight_id where fr.user_id = #{userId} and fr.rating_status in ('PENDING', 'DEFERRED') and (fr.next_remind_at is null or fr.next_remind_at <= #{now}) and (fr.expire_at is null or fr.expire_at > #{now}) order by fi.arrival_time desc, fr.id desc

select rl.id as sourceLogId, rl.flight_id as flightId, rl.recommended_dishes as recommendedDishes, fi.flight_number as flightNumber, fi.departure, fi.destination, fi.departure_time as departureTime, fi.arrival_time as arrivalTime from recommendation_log rl inner join flight_info fi on fi.id = rl.flight_id inner join ( select user_id, flight_id, max(id) as latest_id from recommendation_log where user_id = #{userId} and ( user_feedback like 'MANUAL_SELECTED%' or user_feedback like 'AUTO_SELECTED_OVERDUE%' ) group by user_id, flight_id ) latest on latest.latest_id = rl.id where rl.user_id = #{userId} and fi.arrival_time is not null and fi.arrival_time <= #{now} and (rl.user_rating is null or rl.user_rating = 0) and not exists( select 1 from flight_service_rating fr where fr.user_id = rl.user_id and fr.flight_id = rl.flight_id and fr.rating_status = 'SUBMITTED' ) and not exists( select 1 from flight_service_rating fr2 where fr2.user_id = rl.user_id and fr2.flight_id = rl.flight_id and fr2.rating_status in ('PENDING', 'DEFERRED') and (fr2.expire_at is null or fr2.expire_at > #{now}) ) order by fi.arrival_time desc, rl.id desc limit 30
mapper.insert: insert into flight_service_rating (user_id, flight_id, source_log_id, rating_status, first_visible_at, last_visible_at, next_remind_at, defer_count, expire_at, channel, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{flightId}, #{sourceLogId}, #{ratingStatus}, #{firstVisibleAt}, #{lastVisibleAt}, #{nextRemindAt}, #{deferCount}, #{expireAt}, #{channel}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) on duplicate key update source_log_id = values(source_log_id), rating_status = values(rating_status), first_visible_at = values(first_visible_at), last_visible_at = values(last_visible_at), next_remind_at = values(next_remind_at), defer_count = values(defer_count), expire_at = values(expire_at), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update: update flight_service_rating set rating_score = #{rating}, rating_status = 'SUBMITTED', submitted_at = #{now}, last_visible_at = #{now}, next_remind_at = null, update_time = #{now} where user_id = #{userId} and flight_id = #{flightId} and rating_status in ('PENDING', 'DEFERRED') and (expire_at is null or expire_at > #{now})
mapper.select:
select id as dishId, flavor_tags as flavorTags from dish where id in
#{dishId}

select (select count(1) from recommendation_log) as recommendCount, (select count(1) from user_preference) as preferenceUserCount, (select count(1) from meal_selection) as selectionCount, (select ifnull(avg(user_rating), 0) from recommendation_log where user_rating is not null) as avgRating
mapper.insert: insert into meal_selection (number, status, user_id, flight_id, meal_order, seat_number, create_time, update_time) values (#{number}, #{status}, #{userId}, #{flightId}, #{mealOrder}, #{seatNumber}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select rl.recommended_dishes as recommendedDishes, rl.algorithm_type as algorithmType, rl.user_feedback as userFeedback, rl.create_time as createTime from recommendation_log rl where rl.user_id = #{userId} and rl.flight_id = #{flightId} and rl.user_feedback like 'MANUAL_SELECTED%' and ( rl.user_feedback like concat('%mealOrder=', #{mealOrder}, '%') or (#{mealOrder} = 1 and rl.user_feedback not like '%mealOrder=%') ) order by rl.id desc limit 1

select u.id as userId, u.name, u.current_flight_id as flightId, u.cabin_type as cabinType, u.preference_completed as preferenceCompleted from user u where u.current_flight_id = #{flightId} and not exists( select 1 from meal_selection ms where ms.user_id = u.id and ms.flight_id = #{flightId} )

select u.id as userId, ifnull(u.name, concat('旅客', u.id)) as userName, u.id_number as idNumber, u.current_flight_id as currentFlightId, ifnull(u.preference_completed, 0) as preferenceCompleted, case when u.id_number is null or trim(u.id_number) = '' then '缺少身份证' when u.current_flight_id is null then '缺少航班绑定' when ifnull(u.preference_completed, 0) = 0 then '偏好未完成' else '正常' end as exceptionType from user u where (u.id_number is null or trim(u.id_number) = '') or u.current_flight_id is null or ifnull(u.preference_completed, 0) = 0 order by u.id desc

select tag from ( select case when up.flavor_preferences like '%清淡%' then '清淡党' end as tag from user_preference up where up.user_id = #{userId} union all select case when up.flavor_preferences like '%低脂%' then '低脂偏好' end as tag from user_preference up where up.user_id = #{userId} union all select case when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 1 and json_contains(up.meal_type_preferences, json_quote('1')) then '儿童餐需求' when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 0 and up.meal_type_preferences like '%1%' then '儿童餐需求' end as tag from user_preference up where up.user_id = #{userId} union all select case when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 1 and json_contains(up.meal_type_preferences, json_quote('2')) then '标准餐偏好' when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 0 and up.meal_type_preferences like '%2%' then '标准餐偏好' end as tag from user_preference up where up.user_id = #{userId} union all select case when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 1 and json_contains(up.meal_type_preferences, json_quote('3')) then '清真餐需求' when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 0 and up.meal_type_preferences like '%3%' then '清真餐需求' end as tag from user_preference up where up.user_id = #{userId} union all select case when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 1 and json_contains(up.meal_type_preferences, json_quote('4')) then '素食餐偏好' when json_valid(up.meal_type_preferences) = 0 and up.meal_type_preferences like '%4%' then '素食餐偏好' end as tag from user_preference up where up.user_id = #{userId} union all select case when count(1) >= 3 then '高频预选用户' end as tag from meal_selection ms where ms.user_id = #{userId} ) t where tag is not null

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when fr.rating_status = 'PENDING' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingCount, sum(case when fr.rating_status = 'DEFERRED' then 1 else 0 end) as deferredCount, sum(case when fr.rating_status = 'SUBMITTED' then 1 else 0 end) as submittedCount, sum(case when fr.rating_status = 'EXPIRED' then 1 else 0 end) as expiredCount, ifnull(avg(case when fr.rating_status = 'SUBMITTED' then fr.rating_score end), 0) as avgScore, ifnull(round(sum(case when fr.rating_status = 'SUBMITTED' then 1 else 0 end) / nullif(count(1), 0) * 100, 2), 0) as submitRate from flight_service_rating fr

select fr.id, fr.user_id as userId, ifnull(u.name, concat('旅客', fr.user_id)) as userName, u.id_number as idNumber, fr.flight_id as flightId, fi.flight_number as flightNumber, fi.departure, fi.destination, fi.departure_time as departureTime, fi.arrival_time as arrivalTime, fr.rating_status as ratingStatus, fr.rating_score as ratingScore, fr.defer_count as deferCount, fr.next_remind_at as nextRemindAt, fr.submitted_at as submittedAt, fr.expire_at as expireAt, fr.update_time as updateTime from flight_service_rating fr left join user u on u.id = fr.user_id left join flight_info fi on fi.id = fr.flight_id
fr.rating_status = #{status}
and fi.flight_number like concat('%', #{flightNumber}, '%')
and ( cast(fr.user_id as char) like concat('%', #{userKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(u.name, '') like concat('%', #{userKeyword}, '%') or ifnull(u.id_number, '') like concat('%', #{userKeyword}, '%') )
order by fr.update_time desc, fr.id desc
mapper.update: update flight_service_rating set rating_status = 'PENDING', rating_score = null, submitted_at = null, next_remind_at = #{now}, update_time = #{now} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select fr.id as ratingTaskId, fr.source_log_id as logId, fr.flight_id as flightId, fr.rating_status as ratingStatus, fr.rating_score as ratingScore, fr.defer_count as deferCount, fr.submitted_at as submittedAt, fi.flight_number as flightNumber, fi.departure, fi.destination from flight_service_rating fr inner join flight_info fi on fi.id = fr.flight_id where fr.user_id = #{userId} and fr.rating_status = 'SUBMITTED' order by fr.submitted_at desc

select id, user_id as userId, flight_id as flightId, recommended_dishes as recommendedDishes, algorithm_type as algorithmType, user_rating as userRating, user_feedback as userFeedback, create_time as createTime from recommendation_log where id = #{id}
